text:
3 things a self-running Threads account needs:

1. The official Meta API — not browser hacks. No ban risk.
2. Free tools that cost $0 — GitHub Actions + free AI. Forever.
3. A daily analytics loop — post, see what worked, let AI write better tomorrow.

I set this up in 2 hours. It’s been running itself ever since. Tokens auto-refresh. No logins.

Link in bio if you want your account to run itself
